purpose: Alerts ops when Socket.IO emits fire while the Redis adapter is down — emits in this window only reach the local ECS task and miss users on other tasks (multi-instance broadcast gap).

alarm.name: weelo-socket-adapter-degraded-emits
alarm.description: Socket.IO Redis adapter degraded — emits reaching local-only. Users on other ECS tasks are missing messages. Check ElastiCache health, task CPU/network, and socket.service.ts:setupRedisAdapter retry status.
alarm.runbook: socket adapter degraded emits > 0 sustained for 2m → check ElastiCache Serverless health, task CPU/network saturation, socket.service.ts:setupRedisAdapter retry log.

integration.notes: T1.2 does NOT run aws cloudwatch put-metric-alarm; T1.7 wires this descriptor into the Phase-1 alarms script during dashboard handoff.
